title: Ombudsmen Act 1975 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand legislation establishing the office of Ombudsman and defining their functions, powers, and procedures for investigating complaints against public service agencies, state enterprises, and related organizations. Covers complaint handling, investigation procedures, confidentiality, and reporting requirements.
